name: Onion Pie
recipeIngredient: Fine fresh bread crumbs (nothing highly seasoned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large heavy skillet, spray cooking spray or use water if preferred, and place over moderately high heat until hot but not smoking.
3. Saute onions, stirring occasionally, until they are soft.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together egg substitute, bread crumbs, parmesan, parsley, and onions until the mixture is just combined.
5. Transfer to a 10-inch pie plate sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Bake in the middle of the oven for 30-35 minutes, or until a tester comes out clean. Makes 6 servings.
7. Variation: Replace half parmesan with half cheddar cheese.
